title: Remove find local help navigation icon

requirements.summary: Remove the bottom-right circular navigation button while preserving main tab navigation and hash-based routing
acceptanceCriteria: The circular navigation button with maximum z-index is no longer visible on any page
The BottomNavigationIcon component is removed or disabled
Users can still navigate between tabs using the standard tab navigation in EducationalContent

file_operations.description: Remove the BottomNavigationIcon component import and its usage from the App component. The component currently renders conditionally when not on the QR code page. Keep all other functionality including Header, Footer, EducationalContent, ErrorBoundary, and QueryClientProvider intact.

Delete the BottomNavigationIcon component file as it is no longer needed. This component currently provides a fixed bottom-right circular navigation button with z-index 9999 that uses the useNextRoute hook for navigation.

Remove any CSS utility classes or styles related to bottom navigation visibility if they exist. Based on the file summary, there are utility classes for 'bottom navigation visibility' that should be cleaned up since the navigation icon is being removed.
